title: Homepage Hero
description: Centered hero with a headline, supporting text, and two audience buttons (patient/caregiver vs. provider) with a group-hover effect. White text on a transparent background — sits over a colored/image section.

title: Service Tiles
description: Responsive grid of service cards (image, title, description) with hover lift/zoom, plus a centered pill CTA button.

title: Appointment Booking
description: Blue split panel with a booking pitch on the left and a glassy booking form (name, phone, date, time) on the right. Emails each submission via Formspree (AJAX, with a spam honeypot).

title: Testimonials
description: "What Our Patients Say" section with a heading, intro text, and a responsive grid of review cards (avatar, name, location, stars, quote).

title: Provider Bio
description: Hovering profile tile for a team member: portrait photo beside an eyebrow label, name with credentials, role, key-fact pills, bio paragraph, and a booking CTA. Stacks vertically on mobile.

title: Trust Badges
description: Full-width navy reassurance bar with three trust signals (Offering Telehealth, Accepts Insurance, Accepting New Clients), each a circular-badge icon above a label. Stays a compact three-across row on phones instead of stacking into a tall column.

title: Squarespace Form Styler
description: Drop-in CSS that restyles a native Squarespace Form block to match the site: rounded fields, brand-blue accents, pill submit button, and a card wrapper. On mobile the Name and Phone rows stack and fields shrink so nothing runs off the card.

title: Site Footer
description: Footer with sans-serif type and blue accents. Practice name, phone/fax, email, a soft-blue emergency-use callout, plus Office address and Hours columns. Three-column layout that collapses to two then one on smaller screens, with an auto-updating copyright year.
